introSection:
Black Hole was a Schwarzkopf steel roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands. It operated from 1986 to 1990.

The ride was located in a tent, being very similar to the Black Hole in Alton Towers, both had a space theme and both where Schwarzkopf Jet Stars (even though the one at Alton Towers was a Jet Star 2) and both being inside a tent. This was not the only time, as the rides replacement Rioolrat had a very similar name, theme and walkthrough portion as Rat Ride in Lightwater Valley.
fullText:
Black Hole was a Schwarzkopf steel roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands. It operated from 1986 to 1990.

The ride was located in a tent, being very similar to the Black Hole in Alton Towers, both had a space theme and both where Schwarzkopf Jet Stars (even though the one at Alton Towers was a Jet Star 2) and both being inside a tent. This was not the only time, as the rides replacement Rioolrat had a very similar name, theme and walkthrough portion as Rat Ride in Lightwater Valley.
